<!-- generated by bootstrap-agents-md v1.1.0 -->

# CONTEXT.md

The language of this project. A term listed here means exactly this everywhere — in code, docs, and conversation. When you coin or clarify a term, or settle a directional decision, update this file in the same change.

## Glossary

- **Agent** — a full Eve agent directory under `catalog/agents/<slug>/`, browsable file-by-file without login; indexed as an `AgentListing` (`lib/catalog/types.ts`)
- **Extension** — a curated Eve extension listing under `catalog/extensions/<slug>/`, optionally backed by an npm package; indexed as an `ExtensionListing`
- **Registry** — `catalog/registry.json`, the single index of all agents and extensions (`Registry` type)
- **Listing** — one registry entry (`AgentListing` / `ExtensionListing`): name, slug, summary, category, integrations
- **Composer** — the pick-and-export feature: a `ComposerSelection` of agent/extension slugs kept in `localStorage` (`lib/composer/storage.ts`), exported as a starter zip via `POST /api/composer/export`
- **Category** — a curated grouping of agents (`Category` type: name + slug), derived from listings, drives `/categories/[slug]`
- **Integration** — an external service an agent connects to (slug string, labeled by `integrationLabel` in `lib/site.ts`); directory pages at `/integrations` and `/integrations/[name]` enrich official Eve catalog + scraped details (`catalog/integrations.json`, `catalog/integrations-details.json`) with agents that use the slug
- **Guides** — public MDX docs at `/docs`, authored under `content/docs/` and served by Fumadocs (`source.config.ts`, `lib/source.ts`); may embed live catalog via MDX components (`AgentCard`, `AgentsByIntegration` in `components/mdx.tsx`)
- **llms.txt** — machine-readable index at `/llms.txt`: guides tree plus catalog agent/extension listings (`lib/llms.ts`)
- **llms.mdx** — per-guide Markdown at `/llms.mdx/<slug>` (same slugs as `/docs/<slug>`), from Fumadocs `includeProcessedMarkdown`
- **agents.md** — agent-facing product manifest at `/agents.md`: instructions from `AGENT` in `lib/site.ts` plus a live catalog snapshot
- **Geist / ds tokens** — `--ds-*` foundation in `app/globals.css`, mapped into shadcn semantics; components use `bg-card`, `shadow-surface`, etc. (see `DESIGN.md`)
- **AdSlot** — optional placement component (`components/ad-slot.tsx`); shown only when `SHOW_SPONSOR_SLOTS=true`, otherwise hidden
- **aisdkagents.com** — related AI SDK product linked from site CTAs via `SITE.aisdkUrl` in `lib/site.ts` (with UTM params)

## Decisions

Directional decisions that shape the language and the system. One line each, newest last.

- 2026-07-17: Hybrid catalog model locked — curated git-folder agents are the v1 source of truth; community submit-for-review is out of scope for v1 (no database, no auth)
- 2026-07-17: v1 ships with no database and no auth; everything derives from `catalog/` on disk
- 2026-07-21: Product/ops plans, release checklist, and skills-config live locally only (`docs/plans/`, `docs/release.md`, `docs/agents/skills-config.md` — gitignored)
- 2026-07-21: Surface/line/shadow CSS token namespace renamed from `--kumo-*` to `--adam-*`
- 2026-07-21: Public guides use Fumadocs (MDX in `content/docs/`, routes under `/docs`); `docs/agents/` holds public agent operating docs — do not point Fumadocs at `docs/`
- 2026-07-21: Design tokens follow Geistdocs/Geist scales (`--ds-*`) mapped into shadcn semantics in `app/globals.css` — components keep shadcn class names; no second docs palette
- 2026-07-21: Core shadcn kit lives in `components/ui/`; Tailwind `shadow-*` and product `shadow-surface`/`shadow-chip` both resolve to Geist materials; icons are Hugeicons (`components.json` `iconLibrary`)
- 2026-07-21: Site chrome + agent-facing copy live in `lib/site.ts` (`SITE`, `NAV_LINKS`, `FOOTER_LINKS`, `AGENT`); machine routes `/llms.txt`, `/llms.mdx`, `/agents.md` derive from that config + catalog + Fumadocs source — no `[lang]` / geistdocs adoption for now
- 2026-07-21: Directory pages stay custom RSC (`app/(site)` + `lib/catalog`); Fumadocs owns prose guides only. Cohesion seams: shared Orama search (`lib/search/indexes.ts` indexes guides + catalog), catalog-aware MDX embeds, integrations directory enriched from scraped Eve details with cross-links to `/docs/integrations`
- 2026-07-21: `AdSlot` inventory is opt-in via `SHOW_SPONSOR_SLOTS=true`; unset/false hides every placement
